message:
feat(db): add RU fleet management schema tables

Add comprehensive database schema for RU (Repo Updater) fleet management:

- fleetRepos: Enhanced with 30+ columns for complete repo tracking
  including git state, sync status, and RU integration fields
- fleetSyncOps: Track clone/pull/fetch/push operations with timing
  and error tracking
- agentSweepSessions: Multi-phase automated maintenance run tracking
  with SLB approval integration
- agentSweepPlans: JSON plans with action breakdown and approval workflow
- agentSweepLogs: Detailed execution logs with phase/level filtering

Replaces the minimal agent_sweeps table with proper three-phase workflow
support for agent-sweep operations.

Refs: flywheel_gateway-twx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
